meaning: adj.不觉痛苦的,不受伤害的无感觉的
examples: Of course I told myself that's impassible.
This sort of impassible terrain has no grid overlaid on it.
I told myself that's impassible, the ghost doesn't exists again and again.
And they could not use robots because many of the rooms were impassible.
Their work was hampered by the huge scale of the devastation, where landslides and collapsed buildings made many roads impassible.
